name: ccg
description: Codex-native CCG workflow planner, executor, Git/context, spec, team, quality gates, and manual GPT Pro evidence layer. Codex creates Chinese plans, orchestrates Gemini, applies code, verifies changes, and reports results.

interface.shortDescription: Run CCG workflows with Codex, Gemini, Claude-side compatibility, and manual GPT Pro evidence
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native plugin wrapper for the GPT Pro-enhanced CCG fork. Codex owns planning, implementation, and verification, Gemini can provide bounded read-only evidence, and GPT Pro is exposed as a manual high-value evidence layer for planning, review, and execution companion flows. Includes cache diagnostics, hardened snapshots, high-frequency CCG commands, Git/context helpers, spec workflows, team workflows, and local quality/security gates.
